agents.title: Brief Expander
agents.description: Drafts creative briefs from client kickoff notes.

agents.title: Copy Reviewer
agents.description: Reads draft creative, flags brand-voice misalignment, and suggests rewrites. Routes contentious calls to a human.

agents.title: Deck Builder
agents.description: Generates pitch + status deck drafts from project artifacts (brief, KPIs, milestone notes).

agents.title: Schedule Planner
agents.description: Plans a multi-channel content calendar from approved drafts.

agents.title: Chart Redactor
agents.description: Redacts HIPAA identifiers from a clinical chart with a DETERMINISTIC backstop: the model does the bulk redaction, then createPIIRedactor re-scans and strips any structured identifier it missed (email/phone/SSN + your MRN/DOB rules) — the emitted chart is always clean of those patterns regardless of the model. Clinical findings preserved.

agents.title: Intake Triage
agents.description: Classifies an inbound patient message by urgency (emergency/urgent/routine/administrative/unclear) and routes it — typed output with a DETERMINISTIC red-flag safety net: chest pain / stroke / suicidal ideation / severe bleeding force 'emergency' regardless of the model (the model can only escalate, never downgrade). Unclear/emergency → human triage.

agents.title: SOAP Generator
agents.description: Produces SOAP-format summaries from clinician dictation.

agents.title: Patient Summary
agents.description: Drafts a one-page summary of a patient chart for the next visit.

agents.title: Referral Router
agents.description: Reads inbound referral packets, identifies the receiving specialty, and queues the case for the relevant clinician.

agents.title: Code Review
agents.description: Deep, low-noise code review: 7 focused lenses (correctness, security, performance, maintainability, design, tests, conventions) fan out per file, then every finding is adversarially verified before thresholds apply. Typed findings with applicable patches. Inputs: local git diff, GitHub PR, files, or a snippet. Outputs: Markdown, SARIF, or PR comments. Blocking CI gate.

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.description: Or any provider key your adapter needs.

env.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
env.description: Needed only for the github-pr source and the GitHub reporters.

agents.title: Code QA
agents.description: Runs tests, lint, type-check on a branch and summarises the failures.

agents.title: Dev Implementer
agents.description: Implements QA specs by generating a typed patch and opening a draft GitHub PR against the target branch.

agents.title: Issue Creator
agents.description: Converts each PRD acceptance criterion into a well-formed GitHub issue with title, body, and labels.

agents.title: PRD Author
agents.description: Transforms free-form product descriptions into structured, acceptance-criteria-driven PRDs ready for engineering hand-off.

agents.title: QA Author
agents.description: Produces Vitest spec stubs from acceptance criteria so a test skeleton is committed alongside implementation.

agents.title: Release Notes Drafter
agents.description: Drafts release notes from the merged PRs since the last tag.

agents.title: Test Runner
agents.description: Parses Vitest stdout/stderr and produces a structured test report with failure details for the code-review agent.

agents.title: Docs Chat
agents.description: Provider-agnostic chat over your own docs — grounded RAG answers from retrieved pages, never invented.

env.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env.description: Optional — or any provider key your adapter needs. The agent is provider-agnostic; you pass the adapter.

agents.title: Fraud Investigator
agents.description: Surfaces anomalous transaction clusters and drafts case files.

agents.title: KYC Screener
agents.description: Onboarding KYC screen against sanctions/PEP/adverse-media lists with a DETERMINISTIC fuzzy-match gate: required fields (name/DOB/country) validated up front; strong/exact hits escalate unconditionally (never model-cleared); the model only downgrades weak near-misses. Typed risk verdict + human sign-off.

agents.title: Sanctions Screener
agents.description: Screens a customer/counterparty against a sanctions list with a DETERMINISTIC fuzzy-match gate: strong/exact hits escalate unconditionally (never model-cleared), the model only adjudicates weak near-misses (and can only make screening stricter). Typed verdict + human sign-off.

agents.title: Transaction Monitor
agents.description: Surfaces unusual patterns (velocity spikes, structuring, geo-anomalies) and drafts SAR-ready case files.

agents.title: Knowledge Promoter Agent
agents.description: Turns curated private notes into public documentation PRs — classify, sanitize to vendor-neutral, adversarial leak-gate, then open one draft PR. Never merges; a human reviews.

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.description: Or any provider key your adapter needs.

agents.title: Case Analyst
agents.description: Extracts parties, dates, claims, and procedural posture from a case file.

agents.title: Case Summariser
agents.description: Produces matter-level summaries from a set of reviewed documents.

agents.title: Contract Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews uploaded contracts clause-by-clause for risky language.

agents.title: Discovery Reviewer
agents.description: Reads documents, highlights privileged + responsive material, drafts case notes for human approval.

agents.title: Doc Drafter
agents.description: Drafts memos, motions, and client correspondence from approved facts.

agents.title: Privilege Spotter
agents.description: Re-checks the discovery output for missed attorney-client / work-product material before release.

agents.title: Redaction Bot
agents.description: Redacts PII from a legal document with a DETERMINISTIC backstop (createPIIRedactor strips any structured identifier the model missed — SSN/email/phone + your gov-ID/account rules), and surfaces privileged spans for attorney review instead of silently redacting them. Output is always clean of the covered patterns.

agents.title: Brief Analyst
agents.description: Reads campaign briefs and extracts structured objectives, audience segments, key messages, and success metrics. Anchors all downstream work to brand voice and persona knowledge.

agents.title: Calendar Digest Author
agents.description: Aggregates scheduled social posts for the week and produces a digest summary for Slack. Used by the social-calendar satellite flow.

agents.title: Competitor Researcher
agents.description: Fetches competitor web content via webhook.post, diffs it against the RAG competitor baseline, and produces a structured competitive landscape summary with positioning gaps and messaging opportunities.

agents.title: Copy Author
agents.description: Produces three distinct copy variants — bold/challenger, warm/story-led, and precise/evidence-based — from the structured brief and competitive context. Every variant targets a specific persona and channel.

agents.title: Social Publisher
agents.description: Posts approved copy to Discord and Slack. Formats messages for each platform's conventions and confirms delivery. Runs only after HITL approval.

agents.title: Research Agent
agents.description: Citation-first research agent. Searches the web, reads sources, and answers with every claim anchored to a URL.

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.description: Or any provider key your adapter needs.

agents.title: Escalation Drafter
agents.description: Drafts an internal escalation summary for engineering / account teams.

agents.title: KB Searcher
agents.description: Searches the knowledge base for the relevant article(s) given a ticket.

agents.title: Triage Bot
agents.description: Classifies inbound tickets by topic + severity and suggests a queue.
